name: Grandmother Kreiser's Icebox Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Firmly packed light brown sugar
1/4 cup Chopped walnuts or pecans or almonds
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat together the margarine and sugars until fluffy.
2. Add the eggs and beat until well combined.
3. Beat in the lemon juice and vanilla.
4. Mix together the flour, baking powder, baking soda, cardamom, nuts, salt, and cinnamon.
5. Stir the dry ingredients into the margarine mixture to make a stiff dough.
6. Shape the dough into a long cylinder and refrigerate overnight.
7. Preheat the oven to 375 degrees.
8. Slice the cookie dough paper thin (1/8 inch is best) and arrange on a baking sheet.
9. Bake the cookies until light brown, about 13 to 15 minutes.
YIELD: 36 COOKIES
